text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Ah, if it isn't Her Majesty Pocket! I trust you are in
good health.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I am greatly honored to be here on this fine day
in your stunning presence.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
May Your Majesty shine ever more brightly, and
may your glory dazzle with radiance.

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, pump the brakes with the polite stuff!
What's going on?!

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text:
You feeling okay? I don't get why you're all weird
today—hm? What day is it?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe, it was all a surprise to let you bask in
royal glory. Happy birthday!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Now, Your Majesty, I shall have the attendants
bring your celebratory gifts forthwith. Should you
need anything, I await your call.

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text:
Pft... Hahaha! Just wow! You're the best at this,
Fuji!

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text:
Thanks! I appreciate it! Anything at all, right? I
won't hold back!
